reviews.comment:
Pésima experiencia UNA HORA CUARENTA MINUTOS para cargar combustible NO FUNCIONA LA APLICACIÓN YPF NO FUNCIONA DESCUENTO ACA. Cada vez que viajo por ARGENTINA en NINGÚN ACA TE BRINDAN LOS BENEFICIOS DE SOCIO ACA

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience. It took one hour and forty minutes to fill up. The YPF app doesn't work, and neither does the ACA discount. Every time I travel in Argentina, no ACA station offers the ACA member benefits.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPMUotSEpREAE

reviews.comment:
Se que esta todo costoso, pero acá se pasan un miserable cortado en vaso descartable con una media luna $ 450 pesos, no quiero saber de almorzar o cenar 😯

(Translated by Google)
I know everything is expensive, but here they charge $450 pesos for a measly cortado in a disposable cup with a croissant. I don't even want to think about lunch or dinner 😯
